title: PlayerCTL Status
description: (Linux only) Minecraft mod for showing the current playing song / video on YouTube / Spotify / Netflix / ...
body:
Minecraft mod for showing the current playing song / video on YouTube / Spotify / Netflix / ...

Only works on systems with playerctl. (not on Windows systems!)

It is recommended to use this with https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-playerctl for skipping titles and pause / resume
